local_validation.notes: The BMF source-object-to-runtime proof passes at 1023 in source and binary sibling-kernel modes. Adjacent BMF component runtime and compiler runtime proofs remain green.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BMF source-object compiler stages can now produce a runtime executable tagged repeated rule call. The proof compiles source-shaped BMFChar/BMFRange/BMFBasis/BMFItem/BMFItemMethod/BMFFactor/BMFTerm/BMFExpr/BMFRule objects into comp-bmf rules and executes start ::= $letters: letter+ "!" over source.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/grammar-chars.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-source-rule-to-runtime-band.fk

phase_gate.reason: BMF source-object rules now feed shared component execution for a focused tagged repeat rule. Full parsing of arbitrary text in section [bml.bmf], semantic methods, ParseStack/Context APIs, and complete thesis BML source lowering remain open parity gaps.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bmf-source-rule-to-runtime-band.fk compiles source-shaped BMF objects into comp-bmf runtime rules and executes a tagged repeat rule over source.
form/form-stdlib/compiler.fk broadens BMFItem and BMFItemMethod so range, call, optional, bounded repeat, star, and plus objects can compose into full BMFRule expressions.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records this source-object-to-runtime proof while keeping full thesis parity gaps explicit.
